message:
polish: apply Motion Lexicon TENSION + REVELATION beats

From the interactive-visualization-creator MOTION-LEXICON:

TENSION beat (cancel protocol budget bar):
- Gradient fills: green→orange→red based on remaining budget
- Red glow shadow when budget < 30%
- Matches the skill's recipe: "Green drains away, amber emerges"

REVELATION beat (5 exhibits):
- Chaos Test "0 leaked": spring pop (stiffness 400, damping 20)
- Benchmark ops/sec headline: spring pop with opacity fade-in
- Deterministic Replay "IDENTICAL" verdict: scale 0→1.2→1 pop
- Leak Detection "5/5 caught": spring pop on summary
- Scope Timeout "DEADLINE FIRED": red spring pop

All use the skill's snappy spring preset: stiffness 400, damping
18-22. These are the "aha moments" — the specific interactions
where the concept clicks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
